description: Executable inventory of product behaviors. Required entries must point to an existing test file and a unique source anchor; environment-gated entries must name the gate and runnable command.

behaviors.expectation: Every discovery surface advertises fusion-panel.
behaviors.anchor: model discovery doors advertise the fused model

behaviors.expectation: Every configured named ensemble is addressable as its own fused model.
behaviors.anchor: selects injected fusion-mini

behaviors.expectation: Live namespaced RouteKit model ids remain available as native passthrough choices.
behaviors.anchor: must be advertised as a passthrough

behaviors.expectation: Claude model discovery uses the Anthropic model-list and single-model shapes.
behaviors.anchor: Claude Code's discovery probe

behaviors.expectation: Claude Code and Codex show their matching subscription models under bare native ids while requests resolve through the canonical namespaced RouteKit pool.
behaviors.anchor: Claude picker aliases use the canonical catalog and pooled native relay

behaviors.expectation: Cursor-relative model discovery mirrors the canonical gateway catalog.
behaviors.anchor: Cursor probes the models list

behaviors.expectation: The real Claude CLI can select a named injected fused model and only its configured members run.
behaviors.anchor: id: "claude"

behaviors.expectation: The real Codex CLI can select a named injected fused model and only its configured members run.
behaviors.anchor: id: "codex"

behaviors.expectation: The real OpenCode CLI can select a named injected fused model and only its configured members run.
behaviors.anchor: id: "opencode"

behaviors.expectation: The real Cursor Agent can select fusion-panel through the Cursorkit bridge.
behaviors.gateReason: Requires a genuine Cursor login; the official binary is installed and version-checked in CI.

behaviors.expectation: k=1 panel members receive the caller's exact message history.
behaviors.anchor: members saw the caller's message verbatim

behaviors.expectation: k=1 panel members receive the caller's tool definitions on every front-door dialect.
behaviors.anchor: must be offered the caller's tools via

behaviors.expectation: Sampling, system prompts, auth, tools, and token limits are transformed according to each provider wire.
behaviors.anchor: Anthropic egress preserves tools and normalizes the response

behaviors.expectation: Cursor Responses-hybrid input is translated into a valid chat conversation without dropping tool history.
behaviors.anchor: Cursor hybrid requests translate to chat messages and tools

behaviors.expectation: A fused panel turn fans out once to every healthy configured member.
behaviors.anchor: assertFullPanelOnTheWire

behaviors.expectation: Candidates are judged before synthesis, using the configured judge and synthesizer models.
behaviors.anchor: embedded RouteKit routes namespaced model ids

behaviors.expectation: Selecting a named ensemble runs only its members and its judge.
behaviors.anchor: multi-ensemble routing fans out only

behaviors.expectation: Selecting a namespaced RouteKit model performs exactly one provider call and never invokes the judge.
behaviors.anchor: RouteKit model passthrough routes each namespaced id

behaviors.expectation: Terminal fused responses carry synthesis decision, input trajectory ids, contribution diagnostics, and usage.
behaviors.anchor: test_internal_trajectory_fuse_returns_synthesis_extension

behaviors.expectation: The internal panel fusion mode performs panel fanout, judge, and synthesis.
behaviors.anchor: test_fusion_engine_final_output_is_synthesized_not_top_trajectory

behaviors.expectation: The internal single fusion mode calls only the default model.
behaviors.anchor: test_tracked_fusion_run_records_failure

behaviors.expectation: fusionkit/self generates the configured number of samples and fuses them.
behaviors.anchor: test_panel_runner_generates_self_fusion_candidates

behaviors.expectation: fusionkit/heuristic deterministically routes simple and hard requests to the documented modes.
behaviors.anchor: test_router_routes_hard_keywords_to_panel

behaviors.expectation: RouteKit out-of-band reasoning is parsed separately from answer text.
behaviors.anchor: test_routekit_client_parses_streamed_text_reasoning_usage_and_tools

behaviors.expectation: Anthropic thinking controls, signed thinking, signature deltas, and redacted thinking survive native provider translation and tool-loop replay.
behaviors.anchor: Anthropic egress preserves native thinking controls, signed history, and buffered blocks

behaviors.expectation: Each panel candidate's reasoning is preserved as trajectory evidence and reaches the judge prompt.
behaviors.anchor: candidate, judge, narration, and synthesizer reasoning survive fusion

behaviors.expectation: Structured judge analysis is visible on every door's supported reasoning channel.
behaviors.anchor: judge analysis must be visible

behaviors.expectation: The synthesizer model's own reasoning survives every gateway dialect.
behaviors.anchor: must carry the synthesizer model's own reasoning

behaviors.expectation: Panel fanout and judging progress are narrated without entering answer text.
behaviors.anchor: narrate panel progress on the reasoning channel

behaviors.expectation: Every door closes with its native terminal event or sentinel.
behaviors.anchor: fused streaming closes with the door's native marker

behaviors.expectation: The fused stream's terminal frame carries exact panel plus judge plus synthesizer usage.
behaviors.anchor: test_internal_fuse_streams_openai_neutral_wire

behaviors.expectation: Parallel tool calls packed into multi-slot chunks survive reassembly.
behaviors.anchor: test_interleaved_parallel_calls_fold_by_index_not_arrival_order

behaviors.expectation: Truncated or garbage provider streams emit a safe error event and terminate rather than hanging.
behaviors.anchor: provider streaming surfaces malformed and truncated SSE

behaviors.expectation: Tool calls and results round-trip in the native vocabulary of every front door.
behaviors.anchor: multi-turn fused tool loop round-trips the door's tool dialect

behaviors.expectation: The actual Claude Code binary executes a committed Bash call and posts the result.
behaviors.anchor: real Claude Code CLI executes a fused Bash tool call

behaviors.expectation: The actual Codex binary executes a committed exec_command and posts the result.
behaviors.anchor: real Codex CLI executes a fused exec_command

behaviors.expectation: The actual OpenCode binary executes a committed bash call and posts the result.
behaviors.anchor: real OpenCode CLI executes a fused bash tool

behaviors.expectation: Finite k executes generations 1..k-1 and captures the k-th tool batch unexecuted.
behaviors.anchor: execute boundary 1 and capture boundary 2 unexecuted

behaviors.expectation: Unbounded managed worktree agents execute tools until a terminal model answer.
behaviors.anchor: unbounded managed rollouts execute tools

behaviors.expectation: Canonical tool drivers use the single RouteKit gateway on multiple turns.
behaviors.anchor: real driver runs two fused turns

behaviors.expectation: Managed file tools reject worktree path traversal and record the failure as trajectory evidence.
behaviors.anchor: reject path traversal

behaviors.expectation: A throttled native model fails over to fusion with the failed member excluded.
behaviors.anchor: onRateLimit=fusion

behaviors.expectation: Passthrough policy surfaces RouteKit's native provider failure verbatim.
behaviors.anchor: onRateLimit=passthrough

behaviors.expectation: Fail policy returns an explicit failure and never invokes fusion.
behaviors.anchor: onRateLimit=fail

behaviors.expectation: An exhausted budget is refused with 402 before any RouteKit model call.
behaviors.anchor: exhausted budget is refused before any RouteKit model call

behaviors.expectation: Missing or incorrect gateway bearer credentials fail every door before provider spend.
behaviors.anchor: rejects every door before provider spend

behaviors.expectation: Finite-k rounds re-run the panel over updated messages.
behaviors.anchor: finite-k rounds are memoryless

behaviors.expectation: Completed unbounded candidates persist across gateway restart and resume with zero re-fanout.
behaviors.anchor: survive gateway restart

behaviors.expectation: Fused usage is persisted without inferring provider pricing from namespaced model ids.
behaviors.anchor: without resolving namespaced model ids to provider pricing

behaviors.expectation: A slow k=1 sibling is abandoned after grace without delaying the survivor.
behaviors.anchor: straggler grace aborts

behaviors.expectation: A hard panel timeout prevents judging partial work and does not poison the next turn.
behaviors.anchor: panel timeout fails a turn

behaviors.expectation: Client cancellation prevents later judging and the gateway remains healthy.
behaviors.anchor: caller abort cancels

behaviors.expectation: A structurally malformed body on any door is a 400 in the door's native error envelope with zero provider fanout.
behaviors.anchor: 400 in the native envelope, zero provider fanout

behaviors.expectation: No wire response ever carries JavaScript/Python internals (TypeError text, tracebacks), including for seeded random garbage.
behaviors.anchor: seeded random bodies

behaviors.expectation: The internal Python sidecar rejects invalid model ids as a stable 4xx without leaking tracebacks.
behaviors.anchor: test_fuse_rejects_unknown_routekit_model

behaviors.expectation: OpenAI-compatible streams split at arbitrary byte boundaries, including mid-UTF-8-rune, reassemble byte-exactly.
behaviors.anchor: handles events split at arbitrary byte boundaries

behaviors.expectation: Concurrent streaming turns each carry exactly their own request's content, with per-request provider accounting.
behaviors.anchor: without cross-talk

behaviors.expectation: For every gateway dialect, buffered JSON and streaming SSE reassemble to the same answer.
behaviors.anchor: buffered JSON and SSE reassemble to the same answer

behaviors.expectation: Concurrent fused streams across every gateway dialect preserve per-request content and accounting.
behaviors.anchor: cross-door concurrent fused streams preserve request isolation

behaviors.expectation: A client abort mid-stream leaves concurrent sibling streams and the gateway intact.
behaviors.anchor: leaves concurrent siblings and the gateway intact

behaviors.expectation: Native runs create, complete, inspect, page events, and idempotently replay without extra provider calls.
behaviors.anchor: test_native_fusion_run_idempotency_replay

behaviors.expectation: The real FusionKit CLI loads config, starts RouteKit and the internal Python sidecar, then serves fusion.
behaviors.anchor: boots its production stack

behaviors.expectation: The public RouteKit start, status, and stop commands operate one daemon-backed lifecycle with idempotent startup and graceful request draining, while hidden legacy daemon commands retain their machine contracts.
behaviors.anchor: public RouteKit lifecycle: start, idempotency, upgrade, drain-on-stop

behaviors.expectation: Concurrent product commands race-safely join one authoritative daemon record and gateway, while status observes without starting.
behaviors.anchor: concurrent product commands auto-start exactly one daemon and all use its gateway

behaviors.expectation: The internal RouteKit daemon process entrypoint reports machine-readable readiness and serves model discovery plus every supported gateway dialect against a local upstream.
behaviors.anchor: reports JSON readiness and serves every supported door

behaviors.expectation: The FusionKit CLI exposes fusion launchers and management surfaces while excluding proxy, account, install/uninstall, and direct-mode commands.
behaviors.anchor: Fusion CLI contains only fusion product launch surfaces

behaviors.expectation: The real RouteKit CLI independently executes version, completion, config, provider, model, telemetry, doctor, and install surfaces while rejecting Fusion-only commands.
behaviors.anchor: real routekit command surfaces execute independently

behaviors.expectation: RouteKit model inspection reports the effective provider, native model, account class, billing mode, default status, capabilities, and reasoning metadata without exposing credentials, and rejects unknown models.
behaviors.anchor: providers and models commands use the live namespaced catalog

behaviors.expectation: Namespaced RouteKit model IDs cross the real embedded-router, Python-sidecar, and Fusion-gateway stack while provider credentials remain behind RouteKit.
behaviors.anchor: embedded RouteKit routes namespaced model ids

behaviors.expectation: Fusion bridges authenticated external RouteKit CLI traffic over loopback and closes only the bridge, leaving the independently owned RouteKit process alive.
behaviors.anchor: authenticated external routekit daemon CLI uses a Fusion-owned loopback bridge

behaviors.expectation: Fusion candidate, panel, judge, and provider spans use the registered semantic conventions and preserve trace context.
behaviors.anchor: trace

behaviors.expectation: Local MLX model lifecycle, scale-to-zero, memory pressure, and OOM guidance work on Apple Silicon.
behaviors.gateReason: Requires Apple Silicon and downloaded MLX model weights.

behaviors.expectation: Subscription kinds serialize as claude-code or codex, and the singleton daemon privately enrolls and removes credentials without returning secret material.
behaviors.anchor: singleton daemon exposes authenticated control and a stable reloadable data plane

behaviors.expectation: One daemon mutation imports native or CLIProxy credentials and enables the derived provider; failures restore account/config/revision state, interrupted prepared journals roll back before router startup, committed replays are no-ops, and transaction metadata contains no credential values.
behaviors.anchor: daemon recovers interrupted activation before loading config or starting routers

behaviors.expectation: Native account login isolates official CLI authentication, scrubs unrelated credentials, returns the credential only to the authenticated daemon client, and removes temporary state without writing daemon-owned stores locally.
behaviors.anchor: accounts login captures isolated Codex auth without writing daemon-owned state

behaviors.expectation: Managed Claude and Codex subscriptions translate OpenAI Chat Completions, inject pool credentials only at egress, and normalize usage.
behaviors.anchor: Claude account backend serves OpenAI chat with managed auth and normalized usage

behaviors.expectation: One accounts surface serves every subscription kind by connector: the daemon owns the CLIProxyAPI sidecar lifecycle (spawn, crash restart, managed credential injection, shutdown), reports connector-aware account status, and routes removal by connector.
behaviors.anchor: daemon owns the cliproxy sidecar: spawn, restart, account routing, shutdown

behaviors.expectation: Subscription-backed namespaced model ids drive panel, judge, and synthesis while credentials remain absent from Fusion responses.
behaviors.anchor: subscription-backed model ids drive panel judge and synthesis without leaking credentials

behaviors.expectation: An explicit unknown model id is rejected instead of silently routing through the default model.
behaviors.anchor: unknown models never fall through to the default source

behaviors.expectation: Legacy account aliases normalize canonically and project mutations preserve sparse overlays without inherited defaults.
behaviors.anchor: provider aliases normalize while sparse project mutations stay sparse

behaviors.expectation: CLI typo flags fail, launcher passthrough requires --, and unsupported interactive JSON is rejected with one machine document.
behaviors.anchor: CLI rejects typo flags, gates passthrough behind --, and rejects interactive JSON

behaviors.expectation: RouteKit accounts accept the shipped request shapes and billed fusion completes.
behaviors.gateReason: Requires RouteKit account credentials and incurs spend.

behaviors.expectation: Provider-discovered opaque reasoning efforts survive discovery, route validation, per-model tool selectors, and provider egress without model-name inference or fabricated tiers.
behaviors.anchor: catalog applies configured opaque efforts and rejects unavailable values before egress

behaviors.expectation: Conflicting account-discovered reasoning capabilities resolve by configured account order regardless of response timing.
behaviors.anchor: capability conflicts resolve by account order across reversed response timing
